title: Implement Remaining Aide Expertise Modules
description: Implement concrete Aide subclasses for each executive function coaching area. Each must implement get_expertise_strategies() and get_real_world_insights() following the AttentionCoaching pattern.
key_architecture_notes: CoachingContext now has an 'observation' field (ObservationReport) — access avatar state through that, NOT through context.avatar
Strategy dicts MUST include a 'strategy' key (the name), 'techniques' list, and 'effectiveness' float
Real-world insights should include context_match, stress_reduction, emotional_boost, focus_restoration, independence_building
Aide constructor accepts optional event_bus kwarg for shared event bus
